name: Enchilada Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté the chopped onion and garlic in oil until brown. Add the crushed tomatoes, chilis, oregano, and basil. Simmer until desired flavor is achieved.
2. Reconstitute the whole wheat couscous with hot water. Stir together the couscous, black beans, and crushed tofu until combined.
3. Mix the sauce into the filling to create a desirable consistency. Set aside enough sauce for the casserole.
4. Spray a 9x13 pan with cooking spray and spread a thin layer of sauce in the bottom. Heat a skillet over medium heat and soften the corn tortillas by heating them in the skillet, flipping occasionally until soft.
5. Fill each tortilla with about 2 to 3 tablespoons of the filling. Place the filled tortillas in the casserole dish, covering with remaining sauce.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
Note: Add corn if available.
